summary: A white van passes by the ego vehicle while a motorcyclist rides alongside it. Suddenly, the motorcyclist crashes into the van, resulting in the rider falling onto the road.

events_timeline.event: A white van drives past the ego vehicle.
The motorcyclist crashes into the van, causing the rider to fall.

uncertainties: Motorcycle crash impact details are unclear due to low resolution.

risk_assessment.why: Motorcyclists face higher risks compared to cars when riding closely behind vehicles.
